headline: Kyverna Therapeutics vs. Vertex Pharmaceuticals: Which Drug Developer Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: A clinical-stage innovator faces off against an established biotech powerhouse, each with distinct financials and risk profiles shaping their 2026 outlook.

headline: BioGene Therapeutics Inc. Appoints Ty Howton to Board of Directors
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - June 8, 2026) - PreveCeutical Medical Inc. (CSE: PREV) (OTCQB: PRVCF) (FSE: 18H0) ("PreveCeutical"), a health sciences company that develops innovative options for preventive and curative therapies utilizing organic and nature-identical products, today announced that BioGene Therapeutics Inc. (the "Company"or 'BioGene"), a company that is a significant shareholder of, has appointed Ty Howton to BioGene's Board of Directors, effective immediately....
